hook.summary: Satisfying match-3 gameplay clearing tomato boxes.
hook.visual_action: Matching red hearts to trigger chain reactions and clear board obstacles.

scene_flow: The ad opens on a match-3 puzzle board with a bear character at the top and various goals to achieve.
A player matches red heart pieces, which triggers a sequence of explosions clearing tomato boxes.
A rainbow power-up is used to clear a large portion of the board, accompanied by bright visual effects.
The video ends with a branded end card featuring the game title and a 'PLAY NOW' button.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy satisfying, high-polish match-3 puzzle games.
